cards.title: Run the Vague Prompt
cards.description: Open ChatGPT. Copy and run this prompt. Read the output carefully - notice how generic and unfocused it is. This is your Minion with no guidance.

cards.title: Run the Structured Prompt
cards.description: Now copy and run this structured prompt in the same chat. Compare the two outputs side by side. Same ChatGPT. Different result.
